description: CompositionLight blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with full arm set-in sleeves, branding on left arm, stitch detailing along the back neck and shoulder line, and has graphic print on the frontWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGroove to the music of the Classic Blues on radio this winter in style with this full sleeve t-shirt from wrangler. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill at bay, while the close round neck keeps you warm on those casual winter days when you spend time outdoors with your family and friends. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Size and FitComfort fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
